posts.title: tencentcloud_instance-速查手册
posts.text: 前言约定格式： 1234567891011121314├── aliyun # 云厂商实例文件│ └── aliyun_ecs_mod_demo # 模型名│ └── aliyun_china_platform_7111 # 云账号名│ └── ecs_instance_name_20241224121212 # 实例名│ ├── backend.tf # 实例state文件保存说明：oss│ └── main.tf # 实例具体的参数├── modules # 模型数据文件夹│ ├── aliyun # 云厂商模型文件夹│ │ └── aliyun_ecs_mod_demo # 模型名│ │ ├── main.tf # 模型定义主文件│ │ ├── outputs.tf # 模型定义输出文件│ │ └── variables.tf # 模型定义参数文件│ └── tenmod # 另一个云厂商模型└── tenent # 另一个云厂商实例文件 项目结构1234567891011121314.├── modules│ └── tcloud│ └── tcloud_cvm_mod_demo│ ├── main.tf│ └── variables.tf└── tcloud └── tcloud_cvm_demo └── tcloud_china_game_x6 └── cvm_demo_202501141717 ├── backend.tf └── main.tf modules/modules/tcloud/tcloud_cvm_mod_demo/main.tf1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829terraform { required_providers { tencentcloud = { source = "tencentcloudstack/tencentcloud" } }}provider "tencentcloud" { region = var.region}# 执行模板生成的实例资源resource "tencentcloud_instance" "cvm_instance" { # 从 template_file 数据源中获取生成的实例配置 instance_type = var.instance_type image_id = var.image_id orderly_security_groups = [var.security_group] availability_zone = var.zone_id subnet_id = var.vswitch_id system_disk_type = var.system_disk_type instance_name = var.instance_name instance_charge_type = var.payment_type tags = (merge(var.tags, { "Name" = var.instance_name, } ))} /modules/tcloud/tcloud_cvm_mod_demo/variables.tf1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859606162636465666768// 可以参考：https://papergames.feishu.cn/wiki/B0zWwObowijmTZkSWa4cgOIyn9fvariable "region" { description = "地域" type = string default = "ap-shanghai" // 可以参考：https://cloud.tencent.com/document/api/213/15692#.E5.9C.B0.E5.9F.9F.E5.88.97.E8.A1.A8}variable "zone_id" { // 与aliyun变量保持一致使用时的映射：zone_id -> availability_zone description = "可用区" type = string // 可以参考：https://cloud.tencent.com/document/product/213/6091#MainlandChina}variable "instance_type" { # https://cloud.tencent.com/document/product/213/11518 description = "cvm实例类型" type = string}variable "image_id" { # https://cloud.tencent.com/document/product/213/93093 description = "镜像ID" type = string default = "img-8m9ugrip"}variable "system_disk_type" { # 参考https://cloud.tencent.com/document/api/213/15753#SystemDisk 的DiskType枚举 description = "磁盘类型" type = string default = "CLOUD_BSSD"}variable "instance_name" { description = "cvm实例名" type = string default = "MyCVMInstance"}variable "security_group" { description = "安全组" type = string}variable "vswitch_id" { // 与ecs变量保持一致，使用时的映射：vswitch_id -> subnet_id description = "绑定子网ID" type = string}variable "payment_type" { // 与ecs变量保持一致，使用时的映射：payment_type -> instance_charge_type // 可以参考：https://cloud.tencent.com/document/api/213/15753#Instance的InstanceChargeType字段 description = "计费类型" type = string default = "POSTPAID_BY_HOUR" validation { condition = contains(["PREPAID", "POSTPAID_BY_HOUR", "SPOTPAID", "CDHPAID", "CDCPAID"], var.payment_type) error_message = "The payment_type must be one of PREPAID, POSTPAID_BY_HOUR, SPOTPAID, CDHPAID, CDCPAID" }}variable "tags" { type = map(any) description = "标签"} /tcloud/tcloud_cvm_demo/tcloud_china_game_x6/cvm_demo_202501141717/main.tf123456789101112131415module "cvm_instance" { source = "../../../../modules/tcloud/tcloud_cvm_mod_demo" region = "ap-shanghai" zone_id = "ap-shanghai-2" instance_type = "S8.MEDIUM8" image_id = "img-8m9ugrip" system_disk_type = "CLOUD_BSSD" security_group = "sg-3ygi4gbq" vswitch_id = "subnet-9exx0wt1" instance_name = "pops-tencent-sh-test-devops-demo-0" payment_type = "POSTPAID_BY_HOUR" tags = { Goal = "test" }} /tcloud/tcloud_cvm_demo/tcloud_china_game_x6/cvm_demo_202501141717/backend.tf123456789terraform { backend "oss" { endpoint = "oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com" bucket = "dz-devops" # 替换为你的 OSS Bucket 名称 prefix = "terraform_state/tcloud/tcloud_cvm_demo/tcloud_china_game_x6/cvm_demo_202501141717" key = "terraform.tfstate" # 存储状态文件的路径和名称 region = "cn-hangzhou" # OSS 的地域（根据你的实际情况调整） }} 约定：所有的state文件都要管理在统一的阿里云账号(ak/sk)下面的制定oss内，不同terraform项目实例的state文件通过不同的前缀区分，如terraform_state/tcloud/tcloud_cvm_demo/tcloud_china_game_x6/cvm_demo_202501141717 为了实现此策略，要在terraform初始化时，将ak/sk打入，后续正常使用其他ak/sk进行操作即可： 12# 将xxx替换为实际backend的ak，将yyy替换为实际backend的skterraform init -backend-config="access_key=xxx" -backend-config="secret_key=yyy" 运行测试获取 AK/SK在首次使用 Terraform 之前，需要前往腾讯云的云 API 密钥页面申请安全凭证SecretId和SecretKey2。若已有可使用的安全凭证，则跳过该步骤2。具体步骤如下2： 登录腾讯云访问管理控制台，在左侧导航栏，选择访问密钥>API 密钥管理。 在API 密钥管理页面，单击新建密钥，即可以创建一对SecretId/SecretKey。 设置环境变量将获取到的SecretId和SecretKey设置为环境变量： 12export TENCENTCLOUD_SECRET_ID=your_secret_idexport TENCENTCLOUD_SECRET_KEY=your_secret_key 运行项目进入项目根目录，这里是cvm_demo_202501141717目录： 1cd tcloud/tcloud_cvm_demo/tcloud_china_game_x6/cvm_demo_202501141717 初始化 Terraform 项目: 12# 将xxx替换为实际backend的ak，将yyy替换为实际backend的skterraform init -backend-config="access_key=xxx" -backend-config="secret_key=yyy" 该命令会下载所需的插件和依赖，并初始化后端配置。 类似的输出（首次使用某一个provier时，会先下载）： 12345678910111213141516Initializing the backend...Initializing modules...Initializing provider plugins...- Reusing previous version of tencentcloudstack/tencentcloud from the dependency lock file- Using previously-installed tencentcloudstack/tencentcloud v1.81.159Terraform has been successfully initialized!You may now begin working with Terraform. Try running "terraform plan" to seeany changes that are required for your infrastructure. All Terraform commandsshould now work.If you ever set or change modules or backend configuration for Terraform,rerun this command to reinitialize your working directory. If you forget, othercommands will detect it and remind you to do so if necessary. 预览计划变更： 1terraform plan 会得到类似的结果： 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960Terraform used the selected providers to generate the following execution plan. Resource actions are indicated with the following symbols: + createTerraform will perform the following actions: # module.cvm_instance.tencentcloud_instance.cvm_instance will be created + resource "tencentcloud_instance" "cvm_instance" { + allocate_public_ip = false + availability_zone = "ap-shanghai-2" + cpu = (known after apply) + create_time = (known after apply) + disable_api_termination = false + disable_automation_service = false + disable_monitor_service = false + disable_security_service = false + expired_time = (known after apply) + force_delete = false + id = (known after apply) + image_id = "img-8m9ugrip" + instance_charge_type = "POSTPAID_BY_HOUR" + instance_charge_type_prepaid_renew_flag = (known after apply) + instance_name = "pops-tencent-sh-test-devops-demo-0" + instance_status = (known after apply) + instance_type = "S8.MEDIUM8" + internet_charge_type = (known after apply) + internet_max_bandwidth_out = (known after apply) + key_ids = (known after apply) + key_name = (known after apply) + memory = (known after apply) + orderly_security_groups = [ + "sg-3ygi4gbq", ] + os_name = (known after apply) + private_ip = (known after apply) + project_id = 0 + public_ip = (known after apply) + running_flag = true + security_groups = (known after apply) + subnet_id = "subnet-9exx0wt1" + system_disk_id = (known after apply) + system_disk_name = (known after apply) + system_disk_size = 50 + system_disk_type = "CLOUD_BSSD" + tags = { + "Environment" = "test" + "Goal" = "test" + "Name" = "pops-tencent-sh-test-devops-demo-0" } + uuid = (known after apply) + vpc_id = (known after apply) + data_disks (known after apply) }Plan: 1 to add, 0 to change, 0 to destroy.───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────Note: You didn't use the -out option to save this plan, so Terraform can't guarantee to take exactly these actions if you run "terraform apply" now. 执行变更： 1terraform apply execution plan. Resource actions are indicated with the following symbols: + createTerraform will perform the following actions: # module.cvm_instance.tencentcloud_instance.cvm_instance will be created + resource "tencentcloud_instance" "cvm_instance" { + allocate_public_ip = false + availability_zone = "ap-shanghai-2" + cpu = (known after apply) + create_time = (known after apply) + disable_api_termination = false + disable_automation_service = false + disable_monitor_service = false + disable_security_service = false + expired_time = (known after apply) + force_delete = false + id = (known after apply) + image_id = "img-8m9ugrip" + instance_charge_type = "POSTPAID_BY_HOUR" + instance_charge_type_prepaid_renew_flag = (known after apply) + instance_name = "pops-tencent-sh-test-devops-demo-0" + instance_status = (known after apply) + instance_type = "S8.MEDIUM8" + internet_charge_type = (known after apply) + internet_max_bandwidth_out = (known after apply) + key_ids = (known after apply) + key_name = (known after apply) + memory = (known after apply) + orderly_security_groups = [ + "sg-3ygi4gbq", ] + os_name = (known after apply) + private_ip = (known after apply) + project_id = 0 + public_ip = (known after apply) + running_flag = true + security_groups = (known after apply) + subnet_id = "subnet-9exx0wt1" + system_disk_id = (known after apply) + system_disk_name = (known after apply) + system_disk_size = 50 + system_disk_type = "CLOUD_BSSD" + tags = { + "Environment" = "test" + "Goal" = "test" + "Name" = "pops-tencent-sh-test-devops-demo-0" } + uuid = (known after apply) + vpc_id = (known after apply) + data_disks (known after apply) }Plan: 1 to add, 0 to change, 0 to destroy.Do you want to perform these actions? posts.title: tencentcloud_security_group-测试
posts.text: 前言约定格式： 1234567891011121314├── aliyun # 云厂商实例文件│ └── aliyun_ecs_mod_demo # 模型名│ └── aliyun_china_platform_7111 # 云账号名│ └── ecs_instance_name_20241224121212 # 实例名│ ├── backend.tf # 实例state文件保存说明：oss│ └── main.tf # 实例具体的参数├── modules # 模型数据文件夹│ ├── aliyun # 云厂商模型文件夹│ │ └── aliyun_ecs_mod_demo # 模型名│ │ ├── main.tf # 模型定义主文件│ │ ├── outputs.tf # 模型定义输出文件│ │ └── variables.tf # 模型定义参数文件│ └── tenmod # 另一个云厂商模型└── tenent # 另一个云厂商实例文件 项目结构1234567891011121314.├── modules│ └── tcloud│ └── tcloud_security_group_mode_demo│ ├── main.tf│ ├── output.tf│ └── variables.tf└── tcloud └── tcloud_security_group_demo └── tcloud_china_games_x6 └── security_group_demo_202501231542 ├── backend.tf └── main.tf modules/modules/tcloud/tcloud_security_group_mode_demo/main.tf1234567891011121314151617terraform { required_providers { tencentcloud = { source = "tencentcloudstack/tencentcloud" } }}provider "tencentcloud" { region = var.region}resource "tencentcloud_security_group" "this" { name = var.security_group_name description = "security group test" project_id = var.security_group_project_id} /modules/tcloud/tcloud_security_group_mode_demo/output.tf123output "security_group_instance_id" { value = tencentcloud_security_group.this.id} /modules/tcloud/tcloud_security_group_mode_demo/variables.tf12345678910111213141516variable "region" { description = "地域" type = string default = "ap-shanghai" // 可以参考：https://cloud.tencent.com/document/api/213/15692#.E5.9C.B0.E5.9F.9F.E5.88.97.E8.A1.A8}variable "security_group_name" { description = "安全组名称" type = string}variable "security_group_project_id" { description = "安全组绑定的项目id" type = number} Demo/tcloud/tcloud_security_group_demo/tcloud_china_games_x6/security_group_demo_202501231542/backend.tf123456789terraform { backend "oss" { endpoint = "oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com" bucket = "dz-devops" # 替换为你的 OSS Bucket 名称 prefix = "terraform_state/tcloud/tcloud_security_group_demo/tcloud_china_games_x6/security_group_demo_202501231542" key = "terraform.tfstate" # 存储状态文件的路径和名称 region = "cn-hangzhou" # OSS 的地域（根据你的实际情况调整） }} /tcloud/tcloud_security_group_demo/tcloud_china_games_x6/security_group_demo_202501231542/main.tf1234567module "security_group_instance" { source = "../../../../modules/tcloud/tcloud_security_group_mode_demo" region = "ap-shanghai" security_group_name = "security_group_test" security_group_project_id = 0} 运行测试获取 AK/SK在首次使用 Terraform 之前，需要前往腾讯云的云 API 密钥页面申请安全凭证SecretId和SecretKey2。若已有可使用的安全凭证，则跳过该步骤2。具体步骤如下2： 登录腾讯云访问管理控制台，在左侧导航栏，选择访问密钥>API 密钥管理。 在API 密钥管理页面，单击新建密钥，即可以创建一对SecretId/SecretKey。 设置环境变量将获取到的SecretId和SecretKey设置为环境变量： 12export TENCENTCLOUD_SECRET_ID=your_secret_idexport TENCENTCLOUD_SECRET_KEY=your_secret_key 运行项目进入项目根目录，这里是security_group_demo_202501231542目录： 1cd ./cloudinfra/tcloud/tcloud_security_group_demo/tcloud_china_games_x6/security_group_demo_202501231542 初始化 Terraform 项目: 12# 将xxx替换为实际backend的ak，将yyy替换为实际backend的skterraform init -backend-config="access_key=xxx" -backend-config="secret_key=yyy" 该命令会下载所需的插件和依赖，并初始化后端配置。 类似的输出（首次使用某一个provier时，会先下载）： 123456789101112131415161718192021222324Initializing the backend...Initializing modules...Initializing provider plugins...- Finding latest version of tencentcloudstack/tencentcloud...- Installing tencentcloudstack/tencentcloud v1.81.163...- Installed tencentcloudstack/tencentcloud v1.81.163 (signed by a HashiCorp partner, key ID 84F69E1C1BECF459)Partner and community providers are signed by their developers.If you'd like to know more about provider signing, you can read about it here:https://www.terraform.io/docs/cli/plugins/signing.htmlTerraform has created a lock file .terraform.lock.hcl to record the providerselections it made above. Include this file in your version control repositoryso that Terraform can guarantee to make the same selections by default whenyou run "terraform init" in the future.Terraform has been successfully initialized!You may now begin working with Terraform. Try running "terraform plan" to seeany changes that are required for your infrastructure. All Terraform commandsshould now work.If you ever set or change modules or backend configuration for Terraform,rerun this command to reinitialize your working directory. posts.text: 前言约定格式： 1234567891011121314├── aliyun # 云厂商实例文件│ └── aliyun_ecs_mod_demo # 模型名│ └── aliyun_china_platform_7111 # 云账号名│ └── ecs_instance_name_20241224121212 # 实例名│ ├── backend.tf # 实例state文件保存说明：oss│ └── main.tf # 实例具体的参数├── modules # 模型数据文件夹│ ├── aliyun # 云厂商模型文件夹│ │ └── aliyun_ecs_mod_demo # 模型名│ │ ├── main.tf # 模型定义主文件│ │ ├── outputs.tf # 模型定义输出文件│ │ └── variables.tf # 模型定义参数文件│ └── tenmod # 另一个云厂商模型└── tenent # 另一个云厂商实例文件 项目结构1234567891011121314.├── modules│ └── tcloud│ └── tcloud_vpc_mod_demo│ ├── main.tf│ ├── output.tf│ └── variables.tf└── tcloud └── tcloud_vpc_demo └── tcloud_china_games_x6 └── vpc_demo_202501231139 ├── backend.tf └── main.tf modules/modules/tcloud/tcloud_vpc_mod_demo/main.tf 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627terraform { required_providers { tencentcloud = { source = "tencentcloudstack/tencentcloud" } }}provider "tencentcloud" { region = var.region}resource "tencentcloud_vpc" "this" { cidr_block = var.cidr_block name = var.vpc_name tags = { "test" = "test" }}resource "tencentcloud_subnet" "this" { for_each = var.vswitches name = "${var.vpc_name}-${each.key}" vpc_id = tencentcloud_vpc.this.id cidr_block = each.value.cidr_block availability_zone = each.value.zone_id} /modules/tcloud/tcloud_vpc_mod_demo/output.tf1234output "vpc_id" { value = tencentcloud_vpc.this.id} /modules/tcloud/tcloud_vpc_mod_demo/variables.tf123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930variable "region" { description = "地域" type = string default = "ap-shanghai" // 可以参考：https://cloud.tencent.com/document/api/213/15692#.E5.9C.B0.E5.9F.9F.E5.88.97.E8.A1.A8}variable "vpc_name" { description = "vpc名称" type = string default = "vpcdemo"}variable "cidr_block" { description = "cidr_block" type = string}variable "vswitches" { description = "子网配置定义" type = map(object({ cidr_block = string zone_id = string })) default = { "vswitch1" = { cidr_block = "192.168.1.0/24", zone_id = "ap-shanghai-2" } "vswitch2" = { cidr_block = "192.168.2.0/24", zone_id = "ap-shanghai-5" } }} Demo/tcloud/tcloud_vpc_demo/tcloud_china_games_x6/vpc_demo_202501231139/backend.tf123456789terraform { backend "oss" { endpoint = "oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com" bucket = "dz-devops" # 替换为你的 OSS Bucket 名称 prefix = "terraform_state/tcloud/tcloud_vpc_demo/tcloud_china_game_x6/vpc_demo_202501231139" key = "terraform.tfstate" # 存储状态文件的路径和名称 region = "cn-hangzhou" # OSS 的地域（根据你的实际情况调整） }} /tcloud/tcloud_vpc_demo/tcloud_china_games_x6/vpc_demo_202501231139/main.tf12345678910module "vpc_instance" { source = "../../../../modules/tcloud/tcloud_vpc_mod_demo" region = "ap-shanghai" vpc_name = "vpcdemo" cidr_block = "192.168.0.0/16" vswitches = { "vswitch1" = { cidr_block = "192.168.1.0/24", zone_id = "ap-shanghai-2" } "vswitch2" = { cidr_block = "192.168.2.0/24", zone_id = "ap-shanghai-5" } }} 约定：所有的state文件都要管理在统一的阿里云账号(ak/sk)下面的制定oss内，不同terraform项目实例的state文件通过不同的前缀区分，如terraform_state/tcloud/tcloud_cvm_demo/tcloud_china_game_x6/cvm_demo_202501141717 为了实现此策略，要在terraform初始化时，将ak/sk打入，后续正常使用其他ak/sk进行操作即可： 12# 将xxx替换为实际backend的ak，将yyy替换为实际backend的skterraform init -backend-config="access_key=xxx" -backend-config="secret_key=yyy" 运行测试获取 AK/SK在首次使用 Terraform 之前，需要前往腾讯云的云 API 密钥页面申请安全凭证SecretId和SecretKey2。若已有可使用的安全凭证，则跳过该步骤2。具体步骤如下2： 登录腾讯云访问管理控制台，在左侧导航栏，选择访问密钥>API 密钥管理。 在API 密钥管理页面，单击新建密钥，即可以创建一对SecretId/SecretKey。 设置环境变量将获取到的SecretId和SecretKey设置为环境变量： 12export TENCENTCLOUD_SECRET_ID=your_secret_idexport TENCENTCLOUD_SECRET_KEY=your_secret_key 运行项目进入项目根目录，这里是vpc_demo_202501231139目录： 1cd ./tcloud/tcloud_vpc_demo/tcloud_china_games_x6/vpc_demo_202501231139 初始化 Terraform 项目: 12# 将xxx替换为实际backend的ak，将yyy替换为实际backend的skterraform init -backend-config="access_key=xxx" -backend-config="secret_key=yyy" 该命令会下载所需的插件和依赖，并初始化后端配置。 类似的输出（首次使用某一个provier时，会先下载）： 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728Initializing the backend...Successfully configured the backend "oss"! Terraform will automaticallyuse this backend unless the backend configuration changes.Initializing modules...- vpc_instance in ../../../../modules/tcloud/tcloud_vpc_mod_demoInitializing provider plugins...- Finding latest version of tencentcloudstack/tencentcloud...- Installing tencentcloudstack/tencentcloud v1.81.163...- Installed tencentcloudstack/tencentcloud v1.81.163 (signed by a HashiCorp partner, key ID 84F69E1C1BECF459)Partner and community providers are signed by their developers.If you'd like to know more about provider signing, you can read about it here:https://www.terraform.io/docs/cli/plugins/signing.htmlTerraform has created a lock file .terraform.lock.hcl to record the providerselections it made above. Include this file in your version control repositoryso that Terraform can guarantee to make the same selections by default whenyou run "terraform init" in the future.Terraform has been successfully initialized!You may now begin working with Terraform. Try running "terraform plan" to seeany changes that are required for your infrastructure. All Terraform commandsshould now work.If you ever set or change modules or backend configuration for Terraform,rerun this command to reinitialize your working directory. If you forget, othercommands will detect it and remind you to do so if necessary. 预览计划变更： 1terraform plan 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657Terraform used the selected providers to generate the following execution plan. module.vpc_instance.tencentcloud_subnet.this["vswitch2"] will be created + resource "tencentcloud_subnet" "this" { + availability_zone = "ap-shanghai-5" + available_ip_count = (known after apply) + cidr_block = "192.168.2.0/24" + create_time = (known after apply) + id = (known after apply) + is_default = (known after apply) + is_multicast = true + name = "vpcdemo-vswitch2" + route_table_id = (known after apply) + vpc_id = (known after apply) } # module.vpc_instance.tencentcloud_vpc.this will be created + resource "tencentcloud_vpc" "this" { + assistant_cidrs = (known after apply) + cidr_block = "192.168.0.0/16" + create_time = (known after apply) + default_route_table_id = (known after apply) + dns_servers = (known after apply) + docker_assistant_cidrs = (known after apply) + id = (known after apply) + is_default = (known after apply) + is_multicast = true + name = "vpcdemo" + tags = { + "test" = "test" } }Plan: 3 to add, 0 to change, 0 to destroy.───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────Note: You didn't use the -out option to save this plan, so Terraform can't guarantee to take exactly these actions if you run "terraform apply" now. 执行变更： 1terraform apply 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061626364656667Terraform used the selected providers to generate the following execution plan. posts.text: 前言约定格式： 1234567891011121314├── aliyun # 云厂商实例文件│ └── aliyun_ecs_mod_demo # 模型名│ └── aliyun_china_platform_7111 # 云账号名│ └── ecs_instance_name_20241224121212 # 实例名│ ├── backend.tf # 实例state文件保存说明：oss│ └── main.tf # 实例具体的参数├── modules # 模型数据文件夹│ ├── aliyun # 云厂商模型文件夹│ │ └── aliyun_ecs_mod_demo # 模型名│ │ ├── main.tf # 模型定义主文件│ │ ├── outputs.tf # 模型定义输出文件│ │ └── variables.tf # 模型定义参数文件│ └── tenmod # 另一个云厂商模型└── tenent # 另一个云厂商实例文件 项目结构1234567891011121314.├── modules│ └── tcloud│ └── tcloud_redis_mod_demo│ ├── main.tf│ ├── output.tf│ └── variables.tf└── tcloud └── tcloud_redis_demo └── tcloud_china_game_x6 └── redis_demo_202501221613 ├── backend.tf └── main.tf modules/modules/tcloud/tcloud_redis_mod_demo/main.tf12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728terraform { required_providers { tencentcloud = { source = "tencentcloudstack/tencentcloud" } }}provider "tencentcloud" { region = var.region}resource "tencentcloud_redis_instance" "this" { name = var.instance_name type_id =var.type_id password = var.password mem_size = var.capacity charge_type = var.payment_type subnet_id = var.vswitch_id vpc_id = var.vpc_id availability_zone = var.zone_id tags = (merge(var.tags, { "Name" = var.instance_name, } ))} /modules/tcloud/tcloud_redis_mod_demo/output.tf123output "redis_instance_id" { value = tencentcloud_redis_instance.this.id} /modules/tcloud/tcloud_redis_mod_demo/variables.tf12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061626364656667686970717273variable "region" { description = "地域" type = string default = "ap-shanghai" // 可以参考：https://cloud.tencent.com/document/api/213/15692#.E5.9C.B0.E5.9F.9F.E5.88.97.E8.A1.A8}variable "instance_name" { description = "实例名" type = string}variable "type_id" { // - 2：Redis 2.8 内存版（标准架构）。 // - 3：CKV 3.2 内存版（标准架构）。 // - 4：CKV 3.2 内存版（集群架构）。 // - 6：Redis 4.0 内存版（标准架构）。 // - 7：Redis 4.0 内存版（集群架构）。 // - 8：Redis 5.0 内存版（标准架构）。 // - 9：Redis 5.0 内存版（集群架构）。 // - 15：Redis 6.2 内存版（标准架构）。 // - 16：Redis 6.2 内存版（集群架构）。 // - 17：Redis 7.0 内存版（标准架构）。 // - 18：Redis 7.0 内存版（集群架构）。 description = "实例类型" type = number validation { condition = contains([2, 3, 4, 6, 7, 8, 9, 15, 16, 17, 18], var.type_id) error_message = "The type_id must be one of 2, 3, 4, 6, 7, 8, 9, 15, 16, 17, 18" }}variable "password" { description = "实例密码" type = string}variable "capacity" { description = "实例的容量(MB)" type = number}variable "payment_type" { // POSTPAID(按量付费), PREPAID(包年包月) description = "计费类型" type = string validation { condition = contains(["POSTPAID", "PREPAID"], var.payment_type) error_message = "The payment_type must be one of POSTPAID, PREPAID" }}variable "vswitch_id" { description = "子网ID" type = string}variable "vpc_id" { description = "vpc_id" type = string}variable "zone_id" { description = "可用区" type = string}variable "tags" { description = "标签" type = map(string)} Demo/tcloud/tcloud_redis_demo/tcloud_china_game_x6/redis_demo_202501221613/backend.tf123456789terraform { backend "oss" { endpoint = "oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com" bucket = "dz-devops" # 替换为你的 OSS Bucket 名称 prefix = "terraform_state/tcloud/tcloud_redis_demo/tcloud_china_game_x6/redis_demo_202501221613" key = "terraform.tfstate" # 存储状态文件的路径和名称 region = "cn-hangzhou" # OSS 的地域（根据你的实际情况调整） }} /tcloud/tcloud_redis_demo/tcloud_china_game_x6/redis_demo_202501221613/main.tf123456789101112131415module "redis_instance" { source = "../../../../modules/tcloud/tcloud_redis_mod_demo" region = "ap-shanghai" instance_name = "test-redis" type_id = 7 password = "Kingtest!" capacity = 8192 payment_type = "POSTPAID" vswitch_id = "subnet-oy1pqvzv" vpc_id = "vpc-4tkroxts" zone_id = "ap-shanghai-2" tags = { Goal = "test" }} 获取 AK/SK在首次使用 Terraform 之前，需要前往腾讯云的云 API 密钥页面申请安全凭证SecretId和SecretKey2。若已有可使用的安全凭证，则跳过该步骤2。具体步骤如下2： 登录腾讯云访问管理控制台，在左侧导航栏，选择访问密钥>API 密钥管理。 在API 密钥管理页面，单击新建密钥，即可以创建一对SecretId/SecretKey。 设置环境变量将获取到的SecretId和SecretKey设置为环境变量： 12export TENCENTCLOUD_SECRET_ID=your_secret_idexport TENCENTCLOUD_SECRET_KEY=your_secret_key 运行项目进入项目根目录，这里是redis_demo_202501221613目录： 1cd ./tcloud/tcloud_redis_demo/tcloud_china_game_x6/redis_demo_202501221613 初始化 Terraform 项目: 12# 将xxx替换为实际backend的ak，将yyy替换为实际backend的skterraform init -backend-config="access_key=xxx" -backend-config="secret_key=yyy" 该命令会下载所需的插件和依赖，并初始化后端配置。 类似的输出（首次使用某一个provier时，会先下载）： 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728Initializing the backend...Successfully configured the backend "oss"! Terraform will automaticallyuse this backend unless the backend configuration changes.Initializing modules...- redis_instance in ../../../../modules/tcloud/tcloud_redis_mod_demoInitializing provider plugins...- Finding latest version of tencentcloudstack/tencentcloud...- Installing tencentcloudstack/tencentcloud v1.81.162...- Installed tencentcloudstack/tencentcloud v1.81.162 (signed by a HashiCorp partner, key ID 84F69E1C1BECF459)Partner and community providers are signed by their developers.If you'd like to know more about provider signing, you can read about it here:https://www.terraform.io/docs/cli/plugins/signing.htmlTerraform has created a lock file .terraform.lock.hcl to record the providerselections it made above. Include this file in your version control repositoryso that Terraform can guarantee to make the same selections by default whenyou run "terraform init" in the future.Terraform has been successfully initialized!You may now begin working with Terraform. Try running "terraform plan" to seeany changes that are required for your infrastructure. All Terraform commandsshould now work.If you ever set or change modules or backend configuration for Terraform,rerun this command to reinitialize your working directory. If you forget, othercommands will detect it and remind you to do so if necessary. 预览计划变更： 1terraform plan 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243Terraform used the selected providers to generate the following execution plan. Resource actions are indicated with the following symbols: + createTerraform will perform the following actions: # module.redis_instance.tencentcloud_redis_instance.this will be created + resource "tencentcloud_redis_instance" "this" { + auto_renew_flag = 0 + availability_zone = "ap-shanghai-2" + charge_type = "POSTPAID" + create_time = (known after apply) + dedicated_cluster_id = (known after apply) + id = (known after apply) + ip = (known after apply) + mem_size = 256 + name = "test-redis" + node_info = (known after apply) + password = (sensitive value) + port = 6379 + product_version = (known after apply) + project_id = 0 + redis_cluster_id = (known after apply) + redis_replicas_num = 1 + redis_shard_num = (known after apply) + replica_zone_ids = (known after apply) + replicas_read_only = (known after apply) + status = (known after apply) + subnet_id = "subnet-9exx0wt1" + tags = { + "Environment" = "test" + "Goal" = "test" + "Name" = "test-redis" } + type_id = 2 + vpc_id = (known after apply) }Plan: 1 to add, 0 to change, 0 to destroy.───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────Note: You didn't use the -out option to save this plan, so Terraform can't guarantee to take exactly these actions if you run "terraform apply" now. 执行变更： 1terraform apply 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455Terraform used the selected providers to generate the following execution plan. posts.title: tencentcloud_cos_bucket-测试
posts.text: 前言约定格式： 1234567891011121314├── aliyun # 云厂商实例文件│ └── aliyun_ecs_mod_demo # 模型名│ └── aliyun_china_platform_7111 # 云账号名│ └── ecs_instance_name_20241224121212 # 实例名│ ├── backend.tf # 实例state文件保存说明：oss│ └── main.tf # 实例具体的参数├── modules # 模型数据文件夹│ ├── aliyun # 云厂商模型文件夹│ │ └── aliyun_ecs_mod_demo # 模型名│ │ ├── main.tf # 模型定义主文件│ │ ├── outputs.tf # 模型定义输出文件│ │ └── variables.tf # 模型定义参数文件│ └── tenmod # 另一个云厂商模型└── tenent # 另一个云厂商实例文件 项目结构12345678910111213.├── modules│ └── tencent│ └── tencent_cos_mod_demo│ ├── main.tf│ ├── outputs.tf│ └── variables.tf└── tencent └── tencent_cos_demo └── tenent_china_game_x6 └── cos_demo_202501211630 ├── backend.tf └── main.tf modules/modules/tcloud/tcloud_cos_mod_demo/main.tf1234567891011121314151617181920212223terraform { required_providers { tencentcloud = { source = "tencentcloudstack/tencentcloud" } }}provider "tencentcloud" { region = var.region}data "tencentcloud_user_info" "info" {}locals { app_id = data.tencentcloud_user_info.info.app_id}resource "tencentcloud_cos_bucket" "this" { # Bucket format should be [custom name]-[appid], for example mycos-1258798060. bucket = "${var.bucket_name}-${local.app_id}" acl = var.acl} /modules/tcloud/tcloud_cos_mod_demo/outputs.tf1234567891011121314output "oss_bucket_name" { description = "The name of the created COS bucket" value = tencentcloud_cos_bucket.this.bucket}output "oss_bucket_acl" { description = "The ACL of the created COS bucket" value = tencentcloud_cos_bucket.this.acl}output "oss_bucket_region" { description = "The region of the created COS bucket" value = var.region} /modules/tcloud/tcloud_cos_mod_demo/variables.tf123456789101112131415161718192021222324// 可以参考：https://papergames.feishu.cn/wiki/CqIiwSF7YiByKXk0IO8cYym7nZbvariable "region" { description = "地域" type = string default = "ap-shanghai"}variable "bucket_name" { // https://registry.terraform.io/providers/tencentcloudstack/tencentcloud/latest/docs/resources/cos_bucket#bucket-1 description = "bucket实例名" type = string}variable "acl" { description = "bucket acl" type = string default = "private" # 可选值：private, public-read, public-read-write validation { condition = contains(["private", "public-read", "public-read-write"], var.acl) error_message = "The acl must be one of private, public-read, public-read-write" }} Demo/tcloud/tcloud_cos_demo/tenent_china_game_x6/cos_demo_202501211630/backend.tf123456789terraform { backend "oss" { endpoint = "oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com" bucket = "dz-devops" # 替换为你的 OSS Bucket 名称 prefix = "terraform_state/tcloud/tcloud_cos_demo/tcloud_china_game_x6/cos_demo_202501211630" key = "terraform.tfstate" # 存储状态文件的路径和名称 region = "cn-hangzhou" # OSS 的地域（根据你的实际情况调整） }} /tcloud/tcloud_cos_demo/tenent_china_game_x6/cos_demo_202501211630/main.tf123456module "cos_instance" { source = "../../../../modules/tcloud/tcloud_cos_mod_demo" region = "ap-shanghai" bucket_name = "my-examplebucket" acl = "private"} 约定：所有的state文件都要管理在统一的阿里云账号(ak/sk)下面的制定oss内，不同terraform项目实例的state文件通过不同的前缀区分，如terraform_state/tcloud/tcloud_cvm_demo/tcloud_china_game_x6/cvm_demo_202501141717 为了实现此策略，要在terraform初始化时，将ak/sk打入，后续正常使用其他ak/sk进行操作即可： 12# 将xxx替换为实际backend的ak，将yyy替换为实际backend的skterraform init -backend-config="access_key=xxx" -backend-config="secret_key=yyy" 运行测试获取 AK/SK在首次使用 Terraform 之前，需要前往腾讯云的云 API 密钥页面申请安全凭证SecretId和SecretKey2。若已有可使用的安全凭证，则跳过该步骤2。具体步骤如下2： 登录腾讯云访问管理控制台，在左侧导航栏，选择访问密钥>API 密钥管理。 在API 密钥管理页面，单击新建密钥，即可以创建一对SecretId/SecretKey。 设置环境变量将获取到的SecretId和SecretKey设置为环境变量： 12export TENCENTCLOUD_SECRET_ID=your_secret_idexport TENCENTCLOUD_SECRET_KEY=your_secret_key 运行项目进入项目根目录，这里是cos_demo_202501211630目录： 1cd ./tcloud/tcloud_cos_demo/tenent_china_game_x6/cos_demo_202501211630/ 初始化 Terraform 项目: 12# 将xxx替换为实际backend的ak，将yyy替换为实际backend的skterraform init -backend-config="access_key=xxx" -backend-config="secret_key=yyy" 该命令会下载所需的插件和依赖，并初始化后端配置。 类似的输出（首次使用某一个provier时，会先下载）： 123456789101112131415161718192021222324Initializing the backend...Initializing modules...Initializing provider plugins...- Finding latest version of tencentcloudstack/tencentcloud...- Installing tencentcloudstack/tencentcloud v1.81.161...- Installed tencentcloudstack/tencentcloud v1.81.161 (signed by a HashiCorp partner, key ID 84F69E1C1BECF459)Partner and community providers are signed by their developers.If you'd like to know more about provider signing, you can read about it here:https://www.terraform.io/docs/cli/plugins/signing.htmlTerraform has created a lock file .terraform.lock.hcl to record the providerselections it made above. Include this file in your version control repositoryso that Terraform can guarantee to make the same selections by default whenyou run "terraform init" in the future.Terraform has been successfully initialized!You may now begin working with Terraform. Try running "terraform plan" to seeany changes that are required for your infrastructure. All Terraform commandsshould now work.If you ever set or change modules or backend configuration for Terraform,rerun this command to reinitialize your working directory. If you forget, othercommands will detect it and remind you to do so if necessary. 预览计划变更： 1terraform plan 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445➜ cos_demo_202501211630 git:(huari_dev) ✗ terraform planTerraform used the selected providers to generate the following execution plan. Resource actions are indicated with the following symbols: + createTerraform will perform the following actions: # module.cos_instance.tencentcloud_cos_bucket.this will be created + resource "tencentcloud_cos_bucket" "this" { + acceleration_enable = false + acl = "private" + acl_body = (known after apply) + bucket = "my-example-bucket-1316693898" + cos_bucket_url = (known after apply) + enable_intelligent_tiering = (known after apply) + force_clean = false + id = (known after apply) + intelligent_tiering_days = (known after apply) + intelligent_tiering_request_frequent = (known after apply) + log_enable = false + log_prefix = "logs/" + log_target_bucket = "my-logging-bucket" + versioning_enable = false + lifecycle_rules { + filter_prefix = "archive/" + id = "example-rule" + abort_incomplete_multipart_upload { + days_after_initiation = 1 } + expiration { + days = 30 # (1 unchanged attribute hidden) } } }Plan: 1 to add, 0 to change, 0 to destroy.───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────Note: You didn't use the -out option to save this plan, so Terraform can't guarantee to take exactly these actions if you run "terraform apply" now. 执行变更： 1terraform apply 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061626364656667686970module.cos_instance.tencentcloud_cos_bucket.this: Refreshing state... [id=my-examplebucket-1316693898]Note: Objects have changed outside of TerraformTerraform detected the following changes made outside of Terraform since the last "terraform apply" which may have affected this plan: # module.cos_instance.tencentcloud_cos_bucket.this has changed ~ resource "tencentcloud_cos_bucket" "this" { + acl = "private" + bucket = "my-examplebucket-1316693898" id = "my-examplebucket-1316693898" }Unless you have made equivalent changes to your configuration, or ignored the relevant attributes using ignore_changes, the following plan may include actions to undo orrespond to these changes.───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────Terraform used the selected providers to generate the following execution plan.
